twitter_posts.title:
R to @nutlope: Hallmark has 4 commands:

1/ Build. Asks you 3 questions, then builds a great site.
2/ Study. Paste a screenshot/site to extract theme.
3/ Redesign. Keeps copy/brand but remakes the sit
twitter_posts.description:
Hallmark has 4 commands:

1/ Build. Asks you 3 questions, then builds a great site.
2/ Study. Paste a screenshot/site to extract theme.
3/ Redesign. Keeps copy/brand but remakes the site.
4/ Audit. Get a report on any AI tells you have.

usehallmark.com/
